nodes.name: Window
nodes.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

raw.name: Window
raw.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalSurface
nodes.explanation: AttachmentPortalBrowser dictationHistory owns the split attachment browser shell; receipts must not fall back to the generic ScriptList surface.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalSurface
raw.explanation: AttachmentPortalBrowser dictationHistory owns the split attachment browser shell; receipts must not fall back to the generic ScriptList surface.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalHeader
nodes.explanation: Functional portal header contains search and right-aligned attachment actions.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalHeader
raw.explanation: Functional portal header contains search and right-aligned attachment actions.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalSearch
nodes.explanation: Search keeps the 22px visual lane inside a 28px minimum hit target.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalSearch
raw.explanation: Search keeps the 22px visual lane inside a 28px minimum hit target.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalContent
nodes.explanation: Attachment portal content is a required split browser with list and preview panes.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalContent
raw.explanation: Attachment portal content is a required split browser with list and preview panes.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalList
nodes.explanation: Attachment list uses the left 50% split pane with 40px dense rows.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalList
raw.explanation: Attachment list uses the left 50% split pane with 40px dense rows.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalPreview
nodes.explanation: Preview pane uses 16px inset content spacing and remains content-layer solid theme material.

raw.name: AttachmentPortalPreview
raw.explanation: Preview pane uses 16px inset content spacing and remains content-layer solid theme material.

nodes.name: AttachmentPortalRow[0]
nodes.explanation: dictationHistory attachment rows mirror the shared 40px dense-row hit contract with 16px horizontal padding.
